title: Ibergrif M20202 Shower Head, High Pressure Square Shower Heads, Universal Handheld Shower Head, Saving Shower Head, Rainfall Shower Head for Bath Taps, 1/2" Connection, Chrome
features: [UNIVERSAL SIZE & EASY TO INSTALL] - With global standard G1/2 connector (20mm), the hand shower fits all standard shower hoses. No need the plumber, connects in minutes without tools. Easy to install and use.
[30% WATER SAVING] - Our high pressure shower heads feature supercharge water-saving design, use a smaller silicone nozzle than normal shower, use water more efficiently.
[EASY TO CLEANING] - 48 silicone hole spray water smoothly and will not be clogged, when cleaning the hand shower sprayer, just wipe nozzles with a towel or sponge,simple!
[PREMIUM QUALITY] - Made of ABS + Chrome finished, bath shower head is durable and long life, anti-scratch and fingerprint.
[LIGHT WEIGHT] - Net weight doesn't exceed 150 grams, the bathroom shower head is also perfect for children, widely used in home, hotel, gym, fitness center, etc.
description: From the manufacturer About Ibergrif Ibergrif is one of the leading manufacturers and suppliers of plumbing supplies, faucets in Spain. With an uncompromising dedication to quality and a passion for lifestyle, we are producing products that perfectly meet to the needs and lifestyles of our customers. It is our goal to help customers live a more beautiful and affordable life. Find inspiration for your kitchen and bathroom with Ibergrif Ibergrif M20202 Square Shower Head Our shower head uses the principle of air energy and pressurized water to soften the skin without irritation so that you can enjoy the pleasure of showering. G1 / 2 "thread interface 30% water saving Robust and light 48 silicone nozzle Easy to clean, just squeeze with your fingers, the scale flows out with the water and is not easy to block. Chrome finished Multi-layer chrome plating process, long-lasting bright. Rust protection, corrosion resistance, acid and alkali resistance. Universial G1/2" Interface Our rain shower head is an international 1/2 inch threaded connection that can be combined with all household hoses.
